mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_bases WHERE knowledge_type = 'INTERVIEW' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_bases WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND knowledge_type = 'USER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_bases (id, user_id, file_name, file_type, content, embedding, knowledge_type, chunk_index, metadata, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{content}, #{vecStr}::vector, #{knowledgeType}, #{chunkIdx}, '{}'::jsonb, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
INSERT INTO public.vector_store (id, content, metadata, embedding) VALUES (#{id}::uuid, #{content}, #{metadata}::jsonb, #{vecStr}::vector)
